Call for Case Studies	Call for Case Studies	Call for Case Studies	Call for Case Studies
I'm getting ready to do a live "deep dive" training about Seed Launches... and I always love when I can teach from real life
examples, so I'm looking for some fresh Case Studies.
Seed Launches are those launches where you start with no product and no list (or just a tiny little list), and you roll out
your launch and literally get paid before you create the product. I've been teaching Seed Launches for years, and they are
some of my favorite launches... so I'm excited to give a highly interactive, step-by -step, deep dive training for a small
group of students.
And that's where you might come in - if you've done a Seed Launch, then I might want to profile you and your launch. It
doesn't have to be a huge launch - because the purpose of a Seed Launch is NOT to make a million dollars... it's about
getting started, creating your product, and building your initial list. In fact, my first Seed Launch only did $1,650... but it
was literally the foundation of all my success.
So it doesn't matter how big your Seed Launch was, I'm interested in hearing about it... and I might want to feature you in
one of my Case Studies.
So if you're interested in possibly being one one of my Case Studies, please fill out the form below.
Finally, if you're interested in attending my Seed Launch "deep dive" training, as of right now I'm not sure how many
spots are available. Due to the interactive nature where students will have direct access to me (and my Platinum-level
coaches), we only have limited spots available. And unfortunately, almost all of those spots have been already been pre-
reserved. If you want to be on the "contact list" about any open spots, then there is an option below that you can check
to join the contact list.
best regards,
Jeff
